reset-password.title: Reset Password
reset-password.check-mailbox-description: A code has been sent to email {{name}}

setup-password.title: Setup New Password
setup-password.resetted-successfully: Password has been resetted successfully. Login below.
setup-password.password-reset-failed-description: We are sorry, but your password reset code is either invalid or has expired. Please check the link or request a new password reset.

signup.title: Set up your account.
signup.description: You’ve been invited to use Boat4You. Please finish up your profile below.
signup.invite-failed-description: We are sorry, but your invite is either invalid or has expired. Please check the link or request a new invitation.
